query: I need to purge the CDN cache for our storefront after a big product data update. How do I clear it for just the production zone?
How do I add a custom SSL certificate to our eCDN zone? We have the cert and key PEM files ready to upload.
We're getting hit by bots on our storefront. How do I set up WAF rules and rate limiting on the CDN to block them?
I need to set up logpush so our CDN access logs go to our S3 bucket for analysis. How do I configure that?
How do I configure MRT routing rules on the eCDN zone to route specific paths to our headless application?
I want to enable Page Shield on our storefront zone to monitor third-party scripts and detect potential supply chain attacks.
How do I configure a standalone Cloudflare CDN in front of my Node.js Express application?
I need to set Cache-Control headers in my B2C controller response so the browser caches product pages for one hour.
How do I deploy cartridges to my sandbox and activate the code version?
I want to configure a reverse proxy with nginx to sit in front of my Commerce Cloud instance.
